subcodes.first_line: O believer in God! Thy letter arrived, and therein thou had complained of lonesomeness. Do not be sad.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بالله نامه ات رسید از تنهاای شکایت نموده بودی محزون مباش تنها نیستی
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @consolation and comfort
